selection_rule: Deployed Elo architecture chosen by aggregate frozen-policy rolling out-of-sample log loss with a one-standard-error stability rule; MOV offset and cold-start warmup profiled on the same OOS surface. March is only an in-sample cross-check (single-March split agrees). Period boundaries are derived from the data (nba_wp/periods.py); the dates above are descriptive for this season and are not consumed at runtime.
calibration: Blend fitted by penalized maximum likelihood (logistic stacking) on March component logits; no grid search.
